BackstoryDef.title: Ancient warrior
BackstoryDef.description: In martial arts, [PAWN_nameDef] confidence will not lose to others. [PAWN_pronoun] is a pure martial artist with an integrity heart, but [PAWN_pronoun] is difficult to judge others by himself and always thinks that the people around [PAWN_objective] should also be strict with themselves.

BackstoryDef.title: Powerful ancient cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s cultivation path has reached a certain level. but [PAWN_pronoun] is stuck, although [PAWN_pronoun] has been proud of the group, but [PAWN_pronoun] knows that there should be a chance to rise. With the spiritual energy of the mainland becomes thinner and slower, [PAWN_pronoun] can only choose to sleep for a while.

BackstoryDef.title: Ancient doctor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s medical skills are far superior to ordinary people, and [PAWN_pronoun] has the name of half immortal in the local area. [PAWN_pronoun] was well versed in medicine and mastered many ways to save his life, but [PAWN_pronoun] was also keenly aware that Qi was thinning with each passing year.

BackstoryDef.title: Ancient clan elder
BackstoryDef.description: As an elder, [PAWN_nameDef] holds a lot power in his hands, and the younger members of the clan are very afraid [PAWN_pronoun], but they respect the old monster. During [PAWN_possessive] time as an elder, [PAWN_pronoun] was also concerned about the gradual decline of Qi, but he was ultimately unable to solve it.

BackstoryDef.title: Ancient clan junior
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s talent is extremely high, and several elders in the clan have taken [PAWN_objective] as a personal disciple. [PAWN_possessive] clan is one of the most powerful in the region. No one dares to mess with [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_possessive] life was naturally smooth, which made [PAWN_objective] more and more proud and arrogant.

BackstoryDef.title: Secret treasure carrier
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] takes a treasure from a mysterious place, which leads to a bloody fight. And [PAWN_nameDef] is also guilty of being forced to live deep in the mountains.
